title: Stonecutter GUI Remastered
description: Changes the Stonecutter GUI to a more clear GUI with enlarged Icons and automatic refill
body:
## Remastered Stonecutter GUI Changes the standard vanilla Stonecutter GUI to be better. Including an overall larger UI & larger recipe box that supports more options and enlarged Icons - Supports up to 15 Displayed Recipes at once - Larger Selection Boxs & Icons - Larger overall GUI, no more GUI for Ants - Usable on ALL GUI Displays - Works Client side - Integrates with [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped) workbenches (v3.0.1 and below) - Refill & Bulk Options - Refill - Automatically refill the input slot and select the previous recipe when shift-clicking output - Bulk - Automatically craft the selected recipe when shift-clicking output until inventory is full or none of the same item remain Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
### Refill button included with v1.3.0+
![Remastered GUI Display from Gallery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ODkrKaq7/images/3a379595976c350aea0bb48cf8bf2e8052b6c6b4.png) ### Versions before v1.3.0 ![Remastered GUI Display from Gallery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ODkrKaq7/images/9abdd964924877123bdcc5926c4570a5166f2074.png) *Feel free to use this mod in other modpacks but keep the download within the Modrinth Ecosystem and do not reupload*
